requirement_topic.en: Refrigerant — R-600a Flammable Refrigerant Handling (GSO / IEC 60335-2-24 charge limits, QGOSM)
requirement_topic.zh: 制冷剂——R-600a可燃制冷剂处理（GSO / IEC 60335-2-24充注量限值，QGOSM）
requirement_topic.zht: 製冷劑——R-600a可燃製冷劑處理（GSO / IEC 60335-2-24充注量限值，QGOSM）

summary.en: Household refrigerators marketed in Qatar predominantly use R-600a (isobutane, GWP approximately 3), a hydrocarbon refrigerant. Qatar does not operate an EU-style F-Gas phase-down register; refrigerant safety is governed primarily through the flammable-refrigerant provisions of the GSO-adopted IEC 60335-2-24 standard (Annex covering flammable refrigerants), enforced within the QGOSM conformity assessment. Manufacturers must: (1) verify that the R-600a charge in the appliance complies with the GSO/IEC 60335-2-24 flammable-refrigerant charge limits (maximum charge per compartment configuration, ventilation, and ignition-source requirements); (2) ensure product documentation and the rating plate declare the refrigerant designation (R-600a / isobutane) and the charge quantity in grams; (3) provide the appropriate flammable-refrigerant safety markings and handling/installation precautions. Because R-600a is a hydrocarbon (not a fluorinated gas), it is not subject to HFC phase-down controls; the focus is flammability safety and correct documentation rather than a quota or ban. Qatar, as a GCC state, manages HFCs under the Kigali Amendment to the Montreal Protocol at the national level, separate from appliance-level conformity.
summary.zh: 卡塔尔市场销售的家用电冰箱主要使用R-600a（异丁烷，全球变暖潜能值约3），一种碳氢化合物制冷剂。卡塔尔不设欧盟式氟气体削减登记；制冷剂安全主要通过GSO采用的IEC 60335-2-24标准的可燃制冷剂条款（涉及可燃制冷剂的附件）管理，并在QGOSM合格评定中执行。制造商须：（1）核实器具中的R-600a充注量符合GSO/IEC 60335-2-24可燃制冷剂充注量限值（每种隔间配置的最大充注量、通风及点火源要求）；（2）确保产品文件及铭牌声明制冷剂名称（R-600a/异丁烷）及充注量（克）；（3）提供适当的可燃制冷剂安全标识及处理/安装注意事项。由于R-600a为碳氢化合物（非含氟气体），不受HFC削减管控；重点在于可燃性安全和正确文件，而非配额或禁令。卡塔尔作为海湾国家，在国家层面依据《蒙特利尔议定书基加利修正案》管理HFC，与器具层面的合格评定分立。
summary.zht: 卡塔爾市場銷售的家用電冰箱主要使用R-600a（異丁烷，全球暖化潛能值約3），一種碳氫化合物製冷劑。卡塔爾不設歐盟式氟氣體削減登記；製冷劑安全主要通過GSO採用的IEC 60335-2-24標準的可燃製冷劑條款（涉及可燃製冷劑的附件）管理，並在QGOSM合格評定中執行。製造商須：（1）核實器具中的R-600a充注量符合GSO/IEC 60335-2-24可燃製冷劑充注量限值（每種隔間配置的最大充注量、通風及點火源要求）；（2）確保產品文件及銘牌聲明製冷劑名稱（R-600a/異丁烷）及充注量（克）；（3）提供適當的可燃製冷劑安全標識及處理/安裝注意事項。由於R-600a為碳氫化合物（非含氟氣體），不受HFC削減管控；重點在於可燃性安全和正確文件，而非配額或禁令。卡塔爾作為海灣國家，在國家層面依據《蒙特利爾議定書基加利修正案》管理HFC，與器具層面的合格評定分立。

standards_or_laws: GSO IEC 60335-2-24 — flammable-refrigerant (R-600a) provisions: charge limits, ventilation, and ignition-source requirements (GSO adoption of IEC 60335-2-24, enforced via QGOSM)
ISO 817 — Refrigerants — Designation and safety classification (R-600a classified A3: higher flammability)
Kigali Amendment to the Montreal Protocol — Qatar HFC phase-down at national level (separate from appliance conformity)

summary.en: China addresses flammable-refrigerant (R-600a) charge limits at the appliance level through GB 4706.13-2014 (which incorporates R-600a flammability provisions derived from IEC 60335-2-24), supplemented by GB 9237 (Safety requirements for refrigerating systems and heat pumps, aligned with ISO 5149). China has not adopted an EU-style F-Gas phase-down schedule for refrigeration; it operates its HFC phase-down under the Kigali Amendment to the Montreal Protocol (ratified June 2021), administered by the Ministry of Ecology and Environment (MEE). Chinese refrigerators using R-600a are generally well-positioned for Qatar on the refrigerant dimension, but the charge amount and documentation must be verified against the GSO/IEC 60335-2-24 requirements accepted by QGOSM.
summary.zh: 中国在器具层面通过GB 4706.13-2014（其中包含源自IEC 60335-2-24的R-600a可燃性规定）管理可燃制冷剂（R-600a）充注量限值，并以GB 9237（制冷系统和热泵的安全要求，参照ISO 5149）补充。中国尚未采用欧盟式制冷领域氟气体削减计划；中国依据《蒙特利尔议定书基加利修正案》（2021年6月批准）执行HFC削减计划，由生态环境部（MEE）管理。使用R-600a的中国电冰箱在制冷剂方面对卡塔尔市场一般具备较好条件，但充注量及文件须按QGOSM接受的GSO/IEC 60335-2-24要求核实。
summary.zht: 中國在器具層面通過GB 4706.13-2014（其中包含源自IEC 60335-2-24的R-600a可燃性規定）管理可燃製冷劑（R-600a）充注量限值，並以GB 9237（製冷系統和熱泵的安全要求，參照ISO 5149）補充。中國尚未採用歐盟式製冷領域氟氣體削減計畫；中國依據《蒙特利爾議定書基加利修正案》（2021年6月批准）執行HFC削減計畫，由生態環境部（MEE）管理。使用R-600a的中國電冰箱在製冷劑方面對卡塔爾市場一般具備較好條件，但充注量及文件須按QGOSM接受的GSO/IEC 60335-2-24要求核實。

standards_or_laws: GB 4706.13-2014 — flammable-refrigerant (R-600a) provisions for household refrigerating appliances (derived from IEC 60335-2-24)
GB 9237 — Safety requirements for refrigerating systems and heat pumps (aligned with ISO 5149)
Kigali Amendment to the Montreal Protocol — China HFC phase-down schedule (ratified June 2021, administered by MEE)

gap.en: For R-600a appliances the main gap is documentation and charge verification rather than a fundamental technology gap: (1) Qatar product documentation and the rating plate must explicitly state the refrigerant designation (R-600a / isobutane), the charge weight in grams, and the flammable-refrigerant safety precautions per the GSO-adopted IEC 60335-2-24 provisions. (2) The exact R-600a charge must be verified against the GSO/IEC 60335-2-24 maximum charge limits, which depend on appliance configuration; Chinese CCC test reports under GB 4706.13 may not explicitly confirm charge-limit compliance to the GSO-adopted edition if tested under different configurations. (3) Any model in the export range using an HFC (e.g., R-134a) should be reviewed against Qatar/GCC national HFC controls under the Kigali Amendment, though appliance-level conformity remains driven by the GSO/IEC 60335-2-24 safety provisions rather than an EU-style F-Gas product ban. [NOTE: confirm the exact GSO edition of IEC 60335-2-24 adopted by Qatar and its flammable-refrigerant Annex before regulatory submission.]
gap.zh: 对于R-600a器具，主要差距在于文件和充注量核实，而非根本性技术差距：（1）卡塔尔产品文件及铭牌须明确说明制冷剂名称（R-600a/异丁烷）、充注量（克）及依据GSO采用的IEC 60335-2-24规定的可燃制冷剂安全注意事项。（2）须核实R-600a充注量是否符合GSO/IEC 60335-2-24最大充注量限值，该限值取决于器具配置；若中国依据GB 4706.13的CCC检测报告在不同配置下进行测试，可能未明确确认符合GSO采用版本的充注量限值。（3）出口产品系列中任何使用HFC（如R-134a）的型号应依据《基加利修正案》下卡塔尔/海湾国家HFC管控进行评审，但器具层面的合格评定仍以GSO/IEC 60335-2-24安全规定为主，而非欧盟式氟气体产品禁令。【注：在监管提交前确认卡塔尔采用的IEC 60335-2-24 GSO版本及其可燃制冷剂附件。】
gap.zht: 對於R-600a器具，主要差距在於文件和充注量核實，而非根本性技術差距：（1）卡塔爾產品文件及銘牌須明確說明製冷劑名稱（R-600a/異丁烷）、充注量（克）及依據GSO採用的IEC 60335-2-24規定的可燃製冷劑安全注意事項。（2）須核實R-600a充注量是否符合GSO/IEC 60335-2-24最大充注量限值，該限值取決於器具配置；若中國依據GB 4706.13的CCC檢測報告在不同配置下進行測試，可能未明確確認符合GSO採用版本的充注量限值。（3）出口產品系列中任何使用HFC（如R-134a）的型號應依據《基加利修正案》下卡塔爾/海灣國家HFC管控進行評審，但器具層面的合格評定仍以GSO/IEC 60335-2-24安全規定為主，而非歐盟式氟氣體產品禁令。【注：在監管提交前確認卡塔爾採用的IEC 60335-2-24 GSO版本及其可燃製冷劑附件。】

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory at appliance level via GSO/IEC 60335-2-24 flammable-refrigerant provisions enforced through QGOSM; refrigerant type and charge must be declared; HFC controls at national level under the Kigali Amendment (separate from appliance conformity)
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory at appliance level via GB 4706.13-2014 (R-600a charge limits); China HFC phase-down under Kigali Amendment administered by MEE

source.publisher: Qatar General Organization for Standards and Metrology (QGOSM) / GCC Standardization Organization (GSO)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] R-600a is the dominant refrigerant in Qatar-market household refrigerators and is not subject to an EU-style F-Gas phase-down ban. Manufacturers must verify the R-600a charge against the GSO-adopted IEC 60335-2-24 flammable-refrigerant limits and explicitly declare the refrigerant type and charge weight on the rating plate and in documentation. Any HFC-based models should be reviewed against Qatar/GCC national HFC controls under the Kigali Amendment.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] R-600a是卡塔尔市场家用电冰箱的主流制冷剂，不受欧盟式氟气体削减禁令约束。制造商须核实R-600a充注量是否符合GSO采用的IEC 60335-2-24可燃制冷剂限值，并在铭牌及文件中明确声明制冷剂类型及充注量。任何含HFC的型号应依据《基加利修正案》下卡塔尔/海湾国家HFC管控进行评审。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] R-600a是卡塔爾市場家用電冰箱的主流製冷劑，不受歐盟式氟氣體削減禁令約束。製造商須核實R-600a充注量是否符合GSO採用的IEC 60335-2-24可燃製冷劑限值，並在銘牌及文件中明確聲明製冷劑類型及充注量。任何含HFC的型號應依據《基加利修正案》下卡塔爾/海灣國家HFC管控進行評審。
